# Figaro Barbershop Leucadia

> Premium barbershop in Leucadia, Encinitas, California. Hispanic-owned. Walk-ins welcome.

## Business Info

- Name: Figaro Barbershop Leucadia
- Type: Barbershop
- Address: 114 Leucadia Blvd, Encinitas, CA 92024
- Phone: (760) 751-2008
- Website: https://figaroleucadia.com
- Founded: 2018
- Owner: Ricardo (Master Barber & Owner)
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Sunday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM

## Services

- Haircuts (classic cuts, fades, skin fades, taper fades, textured cuts)
- Beard trims and beard sculpting
- Hot towel shaves
- Straight razor shaves
- Combos (haircut + beard, haircut + shave)
- All cuts include a complimentary hot towel neck razor shave with lather

## Barbers

- Ricardo: Master Barber & Owner — Classic Cuts, Straight Razor Shaves, Hot Towel Treatment, Beard Sculpting
- Zeke: Master Barber — Modern Fades, Classic Styles, Scissor Work, Beard Grooming
- Bryam: Barber — Precision Fades, Clean Lines, Skin Fades, Edge Work
- Johnny: Barber — Creative Cuts, Textured Styles, Freehand Design, Color Work
- David: Barber — Textured Cuts, Beard Work, Taper Fades, Hot Towel Shaves
- Austin: Barber — Sharp Fades, Detail Work, Bald Fades, Line-Ups

## Highlights

- Hispanic-owned business
- Organic grooming products
- Walk-ins welcome
- Pet-friendly shop
- 4.9 out of 5 star rating (36 reviews)

## Location

- Neighborhood: Leucadia
- City: Encinitas
- County: San Diego
- State: California
- Areas served: Leucadia, Encinitas, Cardiff-by-the-Sea, Carlsbad, Solana Beach, Del Mar, Oceanside, North County San Diego

## Booking

- Online booking: https://figaroleucadia.com/book
- Walk-ins accepted
- Call to book: (760) 751-2008
